name: Soft Scrambled Eggs
description: A single hardcoded demo recipe designed to exercise voice guidance, timers, and optional visual checks.

steps.title: Gather tools and ingredients
steps.instruction: Place a nonstick pan, spatula, butter, eggs, and a mixing bowl within reach.
tips: Keep the pan dry for now.
Set the spatula near the stove before you start.

steps.title: Crack the eggs
steps.instruction: Crack 2 eggs into the mixing bowl.
tips: If shell falls in, remove it before whisking.

steps.title: Season and whisk
steps.instruction: Add a pinch of salt and whisk until the yolks and whites are fully combined.
tips: Whisk until the mixture looks uniform and slightly foamy.

steps.title: Heat the pan
steps.instruction: Place the pan over medium-low heat and melt a small pat of butter.
tips: The butter should melt gently, not brown quickly.

steps.title: Cook the eggs
steps.instruction: Pour in the eggs and stir slowly with the spatula until soft curds form.
tips: Keep the heat low and scrape the bottom of the pan gently.

steps.title: Finish and serve
steps.instruction: Remove the pan from heat while the eggs still look slightly glossy, then plate and serve.
tips: Residual heat will continue cooking the eggs for a few seconds.
